--- layout: default title: How to Create, Print, and Export Reports nav_order: 150 --- {% raw %}

How to Create, Print, and Export Reports

Step 1 – The first step in the creation of a new report is to add a new search by clicking the “plus” button at the top of the Events tab.

Step 2 – Next, click on Filters to call up a list of search options.

Step 3 – Select the filters you would like to apply. In the example below, the Audit option has been selected from the Types field.

Step 4 – In the Events pane, select the types of events you would like to include in your report. In the example below, all of the sub-categories under Operator attendance have been selected.

Step 5 – Next, click the View button.

Step 6 – Rename your search and Save it for future use.

Step 7 – Make your report by selecting it from your saved searches list.

Step 8 – Next, click Report.

Step 9 – Specify a time range and click Run report.

Step 10 – Review the report and Print or Export.
